title: SQL Server Wait Stats Baseline Deviation
description: Systematic wait stats deviation analysis — compares current period against historical baseline to identify anomalous wait patterns with no obvious cause
author: Q. Miller

wait_stats_delta.description: Wait stats delta — current hour vs same hour last week baseline

interactive_hints.memory_grant_analysis: Run when RESOURCE_SEMAPHORE waits are elevated — diagnoses memory grant pressure from parallel or sort-heavy queries
interactive_hints.query_store_weekend_changes: Run to check if any query plans changed during the weekend maintenance window — correlates the timing of the deviation
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

memory_grant_analysis.description: Memory grant usage — queries waiting for and holding large memory grants

interactive_hints.query_store_weekend_changes: Run to identify which specific query changed its plan over the weekend and is now requesting excessive memory
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if memory grant analysis is sufficient for your recommendation

query_store_weekend_changes.description: Query Store plan changes during weekend maintenance window

interactive_hints.index_rebuild_side_effects: Run when index maintenance occurred over the weekend — checks whether rebuilt indexes invalidated plans that now require more memory
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here if the plan change history provides sufficient root cause

index_rebuild_side_effects.description: Index rebuild history and associated statistics updates from weekend maintenance

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis — root cause should now be fully established
